The length (PR) of the resistive wire is $$20 \mathrm{~cm}$$. The minimum length of PQ to just glow the LED is _________ $$\mathrm{cm}$$.

subject: Physics
question_text: The coercivity of a magnet is $$5 \times 10^3 \mathrm{~A} / \mathrm{m}$$. The amount of current required to be passed in a solenoid of length $$30 \mathrm{~cm}$$ and the number of turns 150, so that the magnet gets demagnetised when inside the solenoid is ________ A.

subject: Physics
question_text: A body of mass M thrown horizontally with velocity v from the top of the tower of height H touches the ground at a distance of $$100 \mathrm{~m}$$ from the foot of the tower. A body of mass $$2 \mathrm{~M}$$ thrown at a velocity $$\frac{v}{2}$$ from the top of the tower of height $$4 \mathrm{H}$$ will touch the ground at a distance of _______ m.
